title: Is Rei the Main Character
wikitext:
[]: Is Rei the Main Character? Post by sekushi » Fri Dec 07, 2012 4:52 am My friend is hugely into NGE, and I have just seen it the one time but it's gotten me thinking. I had a conversation with him about who the true main character is, and he told me to take it here and see what you think of my "theory." Spoilered for length. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:02 am J says (11:12 PM) doesn't Rei have the most development Laven says (11:12 PM) lol J says (11:12 PM) like she develops into a giant monster Shinji doesn't even get taller

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:10 am Man that was a long but entertaining read. Rei= Kyon

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:11 am I wonder why I never realized Rei sits on That Seat

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:33 am Xard wrote: I wonder why I never realized Rei sits on That Seat

[]: Post by pwhodges » Fri Dec 07, 2012 11:25 am bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Rei= Kyon

[]: Post by Fireball » Fri Dec 07, 2012 1:31 pm Xard wrote: I wonder why I never realized Rei sits on That Seat

[]: Post by Na7e » Fri Dec 07, 2012 2:15 pm Yeah, isn't there an interview somewhere around here where Anno admits he ran out of things do with her after Ramiel, and felt no sympathy for the character?

[]: Post by Rei IV » Fri Dec 07, 2012 2:30 pm Na7e wrote: Yeah, isn't there an interview somewhere around here where Anno admits he ran out of things do with her after Ramiel, and felt no sympathy for the character?

[]: Post by Darkwing » Fri Dec 07, 2012 3:04 pm That would be ironic, since Rei is so popular. And so ripped off by others.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Dec 07, 2012 9:22 pm Rei IV wrote: That's awful ( if such an interview exists).

[]: Post by Rei IV » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:03 pm I'm currently LOL at myself for suffering a severe case of the butt hurt because of the interview. I guess it's safe to stay that Anno is indeed what Internet users call a "troll". Oh well, at least it's reassuring that Rei is (slightly) treated a lot better in the Rebuild franchise ( IMHO) .

[]: Post by Darkwing » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:19 pm Hey, the Rei Fans got revenge in a way. How often does she win the female anime charecter popularity contests?

[]: Post by Rei IV » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:51 pm Darkwing wrote: Hey, the Rei Fans got revenge in a way. How often does she win the female anime charecter popularity contests?

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Dec 07, 2012 10:57 pm Rei IV wrote: It would've been nice if they did made a storyline in the original anime series where Rei would fight for an independent existence (a human one at that) or be given wish to be with Shinji and Co. as a regular shy 14 year old girl, albeit, still slightly cold and mysterious, but one who DOES show emotions from time to time instead of being a deity or doll that carries Lilith's soul (did I get that right? Still fuzzy about their relationship with one another).

[]: Post by Dream » Sat Dec 08, 2012 3:06 am I do have to wonder in what world is Rei smiling at Shinji "complete communication" or any sort of finish to her character arc. I seriously don't understand what Anno was thinking or could have meant with that. What was left of my heart shattered in even smaller pieces when I discovered that even in her NGE2's scenario she's doomed to disappear as human being, they should put the Dantesque warning under the forum's title "Abandon all hope, ye Reifags who enter here".

[]: Post by Xard » Sat Dec 08, 2012 5:22 am Oh, if we're playing this "fun Anno stuff related to Rei" game.... Rei IV wrote: I'm currently LOL at myself for suffering a severe case of the butt hurt because of the interview. I guess it's safe to stay that Anno is indeed what Internet users call a "troll".

[]: Post by Darkwing » Sat Dec 08, 2012 8:49 am I don't know if I'd say her drive was death in the end. Rei does get charecter development. She outright says she's now afraid and doesn't want to return to nothingness anymore later in the series. And I have to wonder if Anno didn't change a bit, at least on Rei's development being done after she smiles. In Rebuild she still does that at the end of 1.11. But Rei continues to get charecter development in 2.22.

[]: Post by Xard » Sat Dec 08, 2012 9:47 am Darkwing wrote: I don't know if I'd say her drive was death in the end. Rei does get charecter development. She outright says she's now afraid and doesn't want to return to nothingness anymore later in the series.

[]: Post by Aiko Heiwa » Sat Dec 08, 2012 10:03 am guys Rei is the [s:3m3gyagg]main[/s:3m3gyagg] only character to me brb editing series to make Rei the only eva character
